seo.title: AI Content Generation implementation checklist
seo.description: A practical checklist for shipping AI Content Generation projects safely.

content.intro: This checklist provides a technical framework for deploying AI content generation pipelines that maintain brand integrity, technical accuracy, and search engine performance while minimizing operational risks.

items.title: System Prompt Brand Guardrails
items.description: Define a system prompt that includes explicit 'do not use' word lists, tone descriptors (e.g., 'technical but accessible'), and persona constraints to prevent generic AI phrasing.

items.title: Few-Shot Example Implementation
items.description: Include at least 3-5 high-quality, human-written content examples in the prompt context to guide the model on structural and stylistic expectations.

items.title: Temperature and Top-P Tuning
items.description: Set temperature between 0.7 and 0.8 for creative writing or 0.2 for factual reporting to ensure consistent output quality across multiple runs.

items.title: Markdown Structure Enforcement
items.description: Specify exact header hierarchies (H1, H2, H3) and list formats in the prompt to ensure the output integrates directly with the frontend components.

items.title: Negative Constraint Testing
items.description: Verify the model adheres to negative constraints, such as 'do not mention competitors' or 'do not use passive voice', through 20+ test iterations.

items.title: Zod Schema Validation
items.description: Validate the JSON output from the LLM against a strict Zod schema to ensure required fields like 'title', 'meta_description', and 'body' are present and correctly typed.

items.title: RAG Grounding Verification
items.description: If using Retrieval-Augmented Generation, verify that every factual claim in the output is mapped to a source chunk in the vector database.

items.title: Hallucination Check for Citations
items.description: Implement a regex or LLM-based scanner to verify that all generated URLs, statistics, and citations are valid and reachable.

items.title: Placeholder Detection
items.description: Scan generated content for common AI placeholders like '[Insert Name Here]' or '[Link to Source]' before it reaches the publishing queue.

items.title: Automated Plagiarism Scanning
items.description: Integrate an API like Copyscape or Turnitin to check generated drafts against existing web content to avoid duplicate content penalties.

items.title: Rate Limit and Backoff Logic
items.description: Implement exponential backoff and retry logic in the generation service to handle 429 errors from LLM providers during peak loads.

items.title: Async Task Queue Management
items.description: Offload content generation to an asynchronous worker (e.g., BullMQ, Celery) to prevent timeout issues during long-form text generation.

items.title: Model Fallback Strategy
items.description: Configure a secondary model (e.g., falling back from GPT-4 to Claude 3) to maintain service availability if the primary provider experiences downtime.

items.title: Token Usage Monitoring
items.description: Implement per-user or per-request token tracking to monitor costs and alert when generation exceeds predefined budget thresholds.

items.title: Generation Versioning
items.description: Store the prompt ID, model version, and temperature alongside each generated piece of content to allow for A/B testing and regression tracking.

items.title: Automated Meta-Tag Generation
items.description: Generate unique meta titles and descriptions constrained to 60 and 160 characters respectively, including the primary keyword.

items.title: Internal Link Suggestion Logic
items.description: Integrate a script that scans the generated text for keywords and automatically suggests or inserts links to existing high-authority pages on the site.

items.title: Readability Score Validation
items.description: Calculate the Flesch-Kincaid grade level of the output to ensure it matches the target audience's reading level (e.g., grade 8-10 for general blogs).

items.title: Image Alt Text Automation
items.description: If images are generated or attached, use a vision model or prompt to create descriptive, SEO-friendly alt text for every asset.

items.title: Keyword Density Analysis
items.description: Verify that the generated content naturally incorporates target keywords without exceeding a 2% density threshold to avoid keyword stuffing flags.

items.title: Draft Approval Workflow
items.description: Implement a 'Pending Review' state in the CMS that requires a human editor to sign off on AI-generated content before it goes live.

items.title: AI Disclosure Compliance
items.description: Ensure the UI includes a disclaimer or metadata tag identifying the content as AI-assisted where legally or ethically required by the platform.

items.title: PII Scrubbing
items.description: Run a pre-processing script to strip any Personally Identifiable Information (PII) from user inputs before sending them to third-party LLM APIs.

items.title: Feedback Loop Integration
items.description: Build a UI mechanism for editors to 'thumbs up/down' or edit content, feeding those corrections back into the prompt context for future runs.

items.title: Content Expiry and Refresh Schedule
items.description: Set a flag for AI-generated content to be re-validated every 6 months to ensure facts and links remain current.
